scripts.sandbox:list: pnpm with-env tsx --conditions react-server src/cli.ts list
scripts.sandbox:doctor: pnpm with-env tsx --conditions react-server src/cli.ts doctor
scripts.sandbox:seed: pnpm with-env tsx --conditions react-server src/cli.ts seed
scripts.sandbox:replay: pnpm with-env tsx --conditions react-server src/cli.ts replay
scripts.sandbox:run: pnpm with-env tsx --conditions react-server src/cli.ts run
